metadata.title: Spark English Centre | Ulaanbaatar
metadata.description: Spark English Centre — English language training center in Ulaanbaatar. Professional teachers, small groups, IELTS preparation.

hero.title: Ignite your English with Spark
hero.subtitle: Spark English Centre — an English language training center in Ulaanbaatar. Professional teachers, small groups, practical learning.

teachers.title: Professional Teachers
teachers.description: Experienced, qualified teachers to help you improve your English level.

groups.title: Small Groups
groups.description: More attention from teachers and more opportunities to speak.

programs.title: Diverse Programs
programs.description: General English, IELTS, Kids English, and Business English.

environment.title: Comfortable Environment
environment.description: Modern classrooms, friendly atmosphere, and room to grow.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: Spark English Centre is a language training center in Ulaanbaatar dedicated to developing English knowledge and skills.
about.mission: To help every student speak, write, and read English with confidence and fluency.

courses.title: Courses
courses.subtitle: Choose the course that fits your level and goals.

general.title: General English
general.description: Levels A1–C1. Balanced training in speaking, listening, reading, and writing.

ielts.title: IELTS Preparation
ielts.description: IELTS strategies, mock tests, and teacher feedback.

kids.title: Kids English
kids.description: Interactive, fun lessons using games and songs for children.

business.title: Business English
business.description: Workplace speaking, emails, presentations, and negotiation skills.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question? Reach out and we'll get back to you soon.

chat.title: Facebook Chat
chat.text: For registration or questions, message us directly on Facebook Messenger. We'll reply as soon as we can.
chat.linkHint: Opens Messenger in a new tab

footer.rights: © {year} Spark English Centre. All rights reserved.

metadata.title: Spark English Summer Camp 2026
metadata.description: English immersion summer camp in Gorkhi Terelj with American teachers. June 14 – August 23, 2026. 10 sessions, ages 7–18.

summerCamp.title: SPARK ENGLISH SUMMER CAMP 2026
summerCamp.intro: Our English immersion summer camp with American teachers runs in 10 sessions from June 14 to August 23, 2026.
summerCamp.description: At Gorkhi Terelj National Park, children learn English in a fully immersive environment — 2–3 hours of classroom lessons daily, plus all-day conversation with international teachers, completely away from phones and the internet.

programs.title: Drama, Film & Creative
programs.description: Creative projects, drama, and film days

programs.title: Sports Program
programs.description: Various sports, movement, and team games

programs.title: Talent Day
programs.description: Showcase talents and discover new skills

summerCamp.programsNote: Children can participate in all activities in both English and Mongolian.
advantages: Professional teachers from America, England, Canada, Philippines, and Mongolia
Practical, easy-to-learn methods focused on listening and speaking skills
Classroom lessons reinforced through all-day conversational practice
5 hot meals and tea per day
New buildings with modern bathrooms and showers
Fresh dairy from local herder families daily
Opportunities to discover and develop new skills
summerCamp.scheduleNote: Each session is 7 days. Register for 14 or 21 days by combining sessions.
summerCamp.registerText: To register for camp or ask a question, message us directly on Facebook chat.
summerCamp.closing: Let's create the best childhood memories together.
